operationalLabIntro: Interactive tools to test template features.
markdownLabDesc: Write Markdown and preview the HTML output in real time.
markdownShortcutHint: Press Ctrl+Enter to update the preview.
internalsIntro: Internal system state and diagnostic tools.
accessibilityDesc: Colors are computed with color-mix() and comply with WCAG 2.1 AA.
i18nDesc: Translations are loaded from local JSON files.
internalsApiDesc: Communication with the ASP.NET Core backend.
apiPlaygroundDesc: Test the getSocial() call filtered by name.
assetResolverDesc: Resolves an image ID via AssetService.
imgBuilderDesc: Create images with custom text using the HTML5 canvas.
contextMenuDesc: Customisable context menu that can be triggered with a right-click or a long press on touch devices.
contextMenuHint: Right-click or press and hold in the area below to open the context menu.
contextMenuDemoArea: Right-click here to open the menu
fontGalleryDesc: Preview of all fonts available in the Image Builder. Click a font to copy its name.
modalDemoDesc: Bootstrap modal examples with confirm, alert and form. Ready to reuse.
modalAlertBody: This is an example informational message.
modalConfirmBody: This action cannot be undone. Do you want to proceed?
contextMenuSampleText: This is sample text. Select it and use the context menu to copy, cut or paste.
